description: Tests if an outcome contains any face card (J, Q, K). Used as a predicate inside event() with card sample spaces. Takes no arguments.

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), cards())
E = event(S, face(), fc(gold))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), cards(hearts))
E = event(S, face(), fc(coral))
